name: qa-mcp
description: A collection of MCP servers that give AI coding assistants — such as GitHub Copilot — the ability to enforce project quality standards in real time.

scripts.package:win-x64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier win-x64 && npx vsce package --target win32-x64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:win-arm64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier win-arm64 && npx vsce package --target win32-arm64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:linux-x64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier linux-x64 && npx vsce package --target linux-x64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:linux-arm64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier linux-arm64 && npx vsce package --target linux-arm64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:osx-x64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier osx-x64 && npx vsce package --target darwin-x64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:osx-arm64: pwsh scripts/publish-servers.ps1 -RuntimeIdentifier osx-arm64 && npx vsce package --target darwin-arm64 --allow-missing-repository
scripts.package:all: npm run package:win-x64 && npm run package:win-arm64 && npm run package:linux-x64 && npm run package:linux-arm64 && npm run package:osx-x64 && npm run package:osx-arm64
scripts.publish:all: npm run package:all && pwsh -Command "Get-ChildItem *.vsix | ForEach-Object { npx vsce publish --packagePath $_.Name }"
